title: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship in Hormuz, Pentagon says
summary_full: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.
summary_public: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship
